name: node-enhanced-resolve
title: node-enhanced-resolve
description:
Offers a async require.resolve function
It's highly configurable.
.
Features
* plugin system
* provide a custom filesystem
* sync and async node.js filesystems included
.
Node.js is an event-based server-side JavaScript engine.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use node-enhanced-resolve because Offers a async require.resolve function.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use node-enhanced-resolve as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair node-enhanced-resolve with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `node-enhanced-resolve --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
